title: Senior iOS Engineer

company.name: Finbox Technologies
company.about: Finbox builds digital lending and payments infrastructure used by banks and fintechs across India.

description: We're hiring a Senior iOS Engineer to own major features end to end. You'll work in Swift with SwiftUI, take part in architecture decisions, mentor junior engineers and work closely with our design and product teams. Solid experience with async/await, a modular codebase and a good testing habit is what we're after.

title: iOS Engineer, Payments

company.name: NorthPay Solutions
company.about: NorthPay is a digital-first payments company helping merchants accept money online and offline.

description: Join our Payments team to build secure and smooth money-movement flows. You'll integrate with payment gateways, harden flows against fraud and care a lot about reliability. Good knowledge of UIKit and Swift concurrency is expected.

title: Mobile Engineer (iOS)

company.name: Trailhead Health
company.about: Trailhead Health helps people manage chronic conditions with personalised, evidence-based care.

description: Contract role building patient-facing features for our iOS app. You'll ship HealthKit integrations, offline-first sync and accessible UI. Comfort working on your own and writing tests is important.

title: Lead iOS Developer

company.name: Lumen Media
company.about: Lumen Media is a streaming company delivering live sports and entertainment to millions of viewers.

description: Lead a team of iOS engineers building our flagship streaming app. You'll set technical direction, work on video playback performance and help the team grow. Deep experience with AVFoundation and large-scale apps is required.

title: Junior iOS Developer

company.name: Finbox Technologies
company.about: Finbox builds digital lending and payments infrastructure used by banks and fintechs across India.

description: A good first role for an early-career iOS developer. You'll pair with senior engineers, fix bugs, ship small features and learn your way around our SwiftUI codebase. We care more about curiosity and willingness to learn than years of experience.

title: Staff Software Engineer, iOS Platform

company.name: Cobalt Systems
company.about: Cobalt builds automation tools that make warehouses and physical spaces safer and smarter.

description: Own the iOS platform our field operators rely on. You'll define core architecture, build shared frameworks, improve our build and CI tooling and raise the bar across mobile. Strong systems thinking and Swift expertise required.
